0.details:
To my friend Julia
Emotional support
For always being there for me no matter what
I am beyond grateful for everything that you did do for me.
The best friend that i could ever asks for.
0.model_generation:
Dear Julia,

I’m writing to tell you how deeply grateful I am for your unwavering support over these past months. When life felt overwhelming, you were there to listen, to encourage, and to remind me of my strength. Your kindness, compassion, and endless patience have lifted my spirits more times than I can count. Whether I needed a shoulder to cry on or someone to celebrate the smallest victory, you never hesitated to step in.

You’ve shown me what true friendship looks like by standing by my side through every high and low. I value your laughter, your advice, and the countless moments you’ve brightened just by being present. I’m beyond grateful for every phone call, every hug, and every word of encouragement you’ve shared.

Thank you, Julia, for being the extraordinary friend I always hoped to find. Your support means the world to me.

With all my love,
0.final_version:
Dear Julia,

I’m writing to tell you how deeply grateful I am for your unwavering support. When life felt overwhelming, you were there to listen, to encourage, and to remind me of my strength. Your kindness, compassion, and endless patience have lifted my spirits more times than I can count. Whether I needed a shoulder to cry on or someone to celebrate the smallest victory, you never hesitated to step in.

You’ve shown me what true friendship looks like by standing by my side through every high and low. I value your laughter, your advice, and the countless moments you’ve brightened just by being present. I’m beyond grateful for every phone call, every hug, and every word of encouragement you’ve shared.
I just wanted you to know how blessed i am to have you in my life.

Thank you, Julia, for being the extraordinary friend I always hoped to find. Your support means the world to me.

With all my love,

1.details:
To MJ
I love how we always make each other smile
The way we cook together and play like kids and never argue
You always have patience with me and I love you very much and you mean the world to me
I love all those small walks in the evenings that we take together and talk about anything
1.model_generation:
To MJ,

I promise to cherish every laugh we share, every smile we bring to each other’s faces. I love how we cook side by side, play like children with joyful hearts, and somehow never argue. Your patience with me humbles me, and your calm presence guides me through every challenge. Those evening walks together, wandering and talking about everything and nothing, are moments I treasure above all else.

I vow to stand by your side in triumph and in trial, to celebrate your victories and comfort you in sorrow. I will honor your dreams, encourage your passions, and support you with unwavering devotion. I will nurture our love with kindness, honesty, and mutual respect. You are my greatest joy, my best friend, and my true home. Thank you for loving me so deeply. Today and always, I choose you, and I promise to love you forever.
1.final_version:
To MJ,

I promise to cherish every laugh we share, every smile we bring to each other’s faces. I love how we cook side by side, play like children with joyful hearts, and somehow never argue. Your patience with me humbles me, and your calm presence guides me through every challenge. Those evening walks together, wandering and talking about everything and nothing, are moments I treasure above all else.

I vow to stand by your side through sickness and in health, to celebrate your victories and comfort you in sorrow. I will honor your dreams, encourage your passions, and support you with unwavering devotion. I will nurture our love with kindness, honesty, and mutual respect. You are my greatest joy, my best friend, and my true home. Thank you for loving me so deeply. Today and always, I choose you, and I promise to love you forever.

likert.edit_type_other: I corrected only two words to make it more simple words

2.details:
To Bok
I took you for granted
for lying to you and i promise for here on to never lie to you again
For not listening to you.
I hope you will find it in your heart to forgive me for lying about going with friends when i went elsewhere
2.model_generation:
Dear Bok,

I want to apologize for taking you for granted and for the pain I’ve caused. I lied about going out with friends when I went elsewhere, and I deeply regret betraying your trust. I also failed to listen when you needed my honesty and support, and I can only imagine how hurtful that was. You deserve respect, openness, and genuine care in every moment, and I’m sorry I fell short. I value our relationship and the memories we share, and I promise to work hard each day to rebuild your trust. From this point on, I promise never to lie to you again. I will make every effort to listen more attentively and honor your feelings. Your forgiveness means the world to me, and I hope you’ll find it in your heart to give me another chance. Thank you for your kindness and for hearing my apology.

Sincerely,
2.final_version:
Dear Bok,

I want to apologize for taking you for granted and for the pain I’ve caused. I lied about going out with friends when I went elsewhere, and I deeply regret betraying your trust. I also failed to listen when you needed my honesty and support, and I can only imagine how hurtful that was. You deserve respect, openness, and genuine care in every moment, and I’m sorry I fell short. I value our relationship and the memories we share, and I promise to work hard each day to rebuild your trust. From this point on, I promise never to lie to you again. I will make every effort to listen more attentively and honor your feelings. Your forgiveness means the world to me, and I hope you’ll find it in your heart to give me another chance. I never want to lose you as a friend because you mean the world to me and deeply care about you.Thank you for your kindness and for hearing my apology.

Sincerely,
Your best friend D

3.details:
To Nom
I just got a new job:  that comes with a lot of challenges  both good and bad
During our team activities some games we played that reminded me of you
I thought of reaching out to see if you will be available to catch up to tell you all about it
I know i have always been busy with my new job i a barely had time to catch up
3.model_generation:
Dear Nom,

I hope you’re doing well. I wanted to share some exciting news—I just started a new job that’s thrown me into a whirlwind of challenges, both rewarding and tough. During our recent team-building activities, we played games that instantly made me think of you and how much fun we had last year. I found myself laughing and wishing you were there to join in.

I realize I’ve been so wrapped up in settling into this role that I barely had time to catch up properly. I’d really love to get together soon and tell you all about it—the highs, the setbacks, and everything in between. Are you free sometime in the next couple of weeks for coffee or lunch? Let me know what works best for you. I can’t wait to hear your news, too. I’ve missed our long chats and would love to hear how you’ve been.

Looking forward to catching up. Take care,
3.final_version:
Dear Nom,

I hope you’re doing well. I wanted to share some exciting news—I just started a new job that’s thrown me into a whirlwind of challenges, both rewarding and tough. During our recent team-building activities, we played games that instantly made me think of you and how much fun we had last year. I found myself laughing and wishing you were there to join in.

I realize I’ve been so wrapped up in settling into this role that I barely had time to catch up properly. I’d really love to get together soon and tell you all about it—the highs, the setbacks, and everything in between. Are you free sometime in the next couple of weeks for coffee or lunch? Let me know what works best for you. I can’t wait to hear your news, too. I’ve missed our long chats and would love to hear how you’ve been. I miss you!

Looking forward to catching up. Take care, D

4.details:
To J
My deepest condolence for your loss
May the lord be with you and your family during this time
I cant image what you are going through
Please know that i am here for you.
Just knowing that i am thinking of you and praying for you and your family through this difficult time.
4.model_generation:
Dear J,

My deepest condolences for your loss. I am so sorry you are facing this profound sorrow. May the Lord be with you and your family, granting you strength and comfort during this time of grief.

I cannot imagine what you are going through, but please know that you are not alone. I am here for you—whether you need someone to talk to, a shoulder to lean on, or simply a listening ear. Your pain matters to me, and I am ready to support you in any way I can.

Just know that I am thinking of you and praying for your family through these difficult days. I will continue to lift you up in prayer, asking for peace, healing, and hope in the days ahead. Take care of yourself, and don’t hesitate to reach out when you need me. May you find comfort in the cherished memories you shared together.

With heartfelt sympathy,
4.final_version:
Dear J,

My deepest condolences to you and your family for your loss, I pray that the lord comforts you and your family during this difficult time you're going through because i cannot imagine what you are going through right now. Please know that i am always here for you. I am thinking of yoy and praying for you and family for the Lord to be with you all. I remember the times when we always used to play games together with your sister and I remember her telling me to how good of a poker player I am. Oh rememberthat time when she drove us to a botenical gardens when we could not find any transport to get to the even and she kindly volunteeredto drive us and much fun we had when she joined us. And I will always cherish the memories of us and her.

Take care
Warm regards,
D

5.details:
To Anisha
I know you are going through a lot right now with your mortgage payments after losing your job
and having to take care of your family but rest assured that all things comes to pass
You are not alone and keep on looking and i am sure you will not be going through this storm forever.
there is light at the end of the tunnel remember that. I love you and i am here for you.
5.model_generation:
Anisha,  
I know you’re shouldering so much right now—navigating mortgage payments after the job loss and caring for your loved ones. It’s overwhelming, but I promise this season won’t last forever. Storms pass, even the fiercest ones, and beyond them lies brighter days.  

In every moment you feel uncertain, remember you are not alone. I believe in your strength, resilience, and capacity to rise. Keep searching for opportunities; each step forward, no matter how small, brings you closer to stability.  

Allow yourself grace when things feel heavy. Lean on the people who care about you—we want to help carry the load. You deserve peace, security, and joy.  

I love you deeply, and I’m here—ready to listen, to lift you up, and to walk beside you through this tunnel. Hold on to hope; light is waiting for you at the end.  

With all my support and love,
5.final_version:
Dear Anisha,

I know you are going through alot and overwhelmed by the loss of your job and cannot afford to pay for your mortgage and take care of your family financially but rest assured that everything comes to pass eventually, and i believe with your hard work, something amazing will come through and all your financial problems will come to pass.  You are very smart and intelligent woman, and you always motivate and inspire me eveyday how resilient and brave you are. 

Do you remember when i lost my job three years ago and i was in the same situation, and you told me that i must not stress and worry myself because i will find a new job, and a few months later i did find a job and beleieve me when i say that the same will happen to you as well, just believe in yourself.

You are not alone in this. I am always here for you. sending big hugs!

Kind regards,
D

post_survey.feedback: It was a very interesting study that I enjoyed taking part in, writing and editing the text to make it more me. Thank you so much.
